cells: Normal main verbs

Simple tenses
Continuous tenses
Perfect tenses

• **Do** you feel cold? • **Did** they go shopping?
• **Am** I annoying you? • **Were** they waiting for you?
• **Have** you seen this film? • **Had** it started?
cells_uz: Oddiy asosiy fe'llar

Oddiy zamonlar
Davomli zamonlar
Perfect zamonlar

• **Do** you feel cold? • **Did** they go shopping?
• **Am** I annoying you? • **Were** they waiting for you?
• **Have** you seen this film? • **Had** it started?
cells_ru: Обычные основные глаголы

Простые времена
Длительные времена
Времена Perfect

• **Do** you feel cold? • **Did** they go shopping?
• **Am** I annoying you? • **Were** they waiting for you?
• **Have** you seen this film? • **Had** it started?

cells: Be as a main verb
• **Am** I late? • **Were** you all right? • **Have** you been ill?
cells_uz: Be asosiy fe'l sifatida
• **Am** I late? • **Were** you all right? • **Have** you been ill?
cells_ru: Be как основной глагол
• **Am** I late? • **Were** you all right? • **Have** you been ill?

cells: Have as a main verb
• **Does** she **have** a bath every day? • **Did** they have lunch at one o'clock?
cells_uz: Have asosiy fe'l sifatida
• **Does** she **have** a bath every day? • **Did** they have lunch at one o'clock?
cells_ru: Have как основной глагол
• **Does** she **have** a bath every day? • **Did** they have lunch at one o'clock?

cells: Modals
• **Should** I call the police? • **Could** you call me later?
cells_uz: Modal fe'llar
• **Should** I call the police? • **Could** you call me later?
cells_ru: Модальные глаголы
• **Should** I call the police? • **Could** you call me later?

cells: Question words

• **Who** was in prison? • **What's** your name? • **Where** do they live?
• **Why** did you do that?
cells_uz: So'roq so'zlari

• **Who** was in prison? • **What's** your name? • **Where** do they live?
• **Why** did you do that?
cells_ru: Вопросительные слова

• **Who** was in prison? • **What's** your name? • **Where** do they live?
• **Why** did you do that?

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Passiv gaplarda so'roq so'zini subyektdan oldin qo'yamiz. Agar bir nechta yordamchi fe'l bo'lsa, faqat birinchisi subyektdan oldin keladi.
✓ _**Was** Mr Jenkins arrested yesterday?_
✓ _**Has** Mr Jenkins **been** arrested?_

• Who va what so'roq so'zlari bilan, agar so'roq so'zi gap ob'ektiga tegishli bo'lsa, do yordamchi fe'lidan foydalanamiz.
✓ _Who **told** you?_ (= Someone told you. Who?)
✓ _Who **did** you **tell**?_ (= You told someone. Who?)
tip.translation_ru:
• В пассивных вопросах вспомогательный глагол ставится перед подлежащим. Если вспомогательных глаголов несколько, перед подлежащим идёт только первый.
✓ _**Was** Mr Jenkins arrested yesterday?_
✓ _**Has** Mr Jenkins **been** arrested?_

• С вопросительными словами who и what, когда вопросительное слово относится к объекту глагола, используем do.
✓ _Who **told** you?_ (= Someone told you. Who?)
✓ _Who **did** you **tell**?_ (= You told someone. Who?)

cells: To ask someone to agree with us
_It's confusing, **isn't it**?_
cells_uz: Kimnidir biz bilan rozi bo'lishini so'rash uchun
_It's confusing, **isn't it**?_
cells_ru: Чтобы попросить кого-то согласиться с нами
_It's confusing, **isn't it**?_

cells: To check whether something is true
_You haven't been to prison, **have you**?_
cells_uz: Biror narsa haqiqatligini tekshirish uchun
_You haven't been to prison, **have you**?_
cells_ru: Чтобы проверить, верно ли что-то
_You haven't been to prison, **have you**?_

cells: Normal main verbs

Simple tenses
Continuous tenses
Perfect tenses

• Phil **works** here, **doesn't he**? • They **didn't leave**, **did they**?
• You **are coming**, **aren't you**? • They **weren't looking**, **were they**?
• They'**ve gone**, **haven't they**? • You **hadn't seen** it, **had you**?
cells_uz: Oddiy asosiy fe'llar

Oddiy zamonlar
Davomli zamonlar
Perfect zamonlar

• Phil **works** here, **doesn't he**? • They **didn't leave**, **did they**?
• You **are coming**, **aren't you**? • They **weren't looking**, **were they**?
• They'**ve gone**, **haven't they**? • You **hadn't seen** it, **had you**?
cells_ru: Обычные основные глаголы

Простые времена
Длительные времена
Времена Perfect

• Phil **works** here, **doesn't he**? • They **didn't leave**, **did they**?
• You **are coming**, **aren't you**? • They **weren't looking**, **were they**?
• They'**ve gone**, **haven't they**? • You **hadn't seen** it, **had you**?

cells: Be as a main verb
• He's new here, **isn't he**? • You **weren't** old enough, **were you**?
cells_uz: Be asosiy fe'l sifatida
• He's new here, **isn't he**? • You **weren't** old enough, **were you**?
cells_ru: Be как основной глагол
• He's new here, **isn't he**? • You **weren't** old enough, **were you**?

cells: Have as a main verb
• They **have** a car, **haven't / don't** they? • You **didn't have** a shower every day, **did you**?
cells_uz: Have asosiy fe'l sifatida
• They **have** a car, **haven't / don't** they? • You **didn't have** a shower every day, **did you**?
cells_ru: Have как основной глагол
• They **have** a car, **haven't / don't** they? • You **didn't have** a shower every day, **did you**?

cells: Modals
• Jan **should** be here by now, **shouldn't she**? • You **won't** make a mess, **will you**?
cells_uz: Modal fe'llar
• Jan **should** be here by now, **shouldn't she**? • You **won't** make a mess, **will you**?
cells_ru: Модальные глаголы
• Jan **should** be here by now, **shouldn't she**? • You **won't** make a mess, **will you**?

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
• _I am_ bilan gap tuzilganda, question tag sifatida _aren't I?_ ishlatamiz. _I'm not_ bilan esa _am I?_ ishlatamiz.
✓ _I'm right, **aren't I**?_
✓ _I'm **not** stupid, **am I**?_
tip.translation_ru:
• В предложениях с _I am_ используем question tag _aren't I?_ В предложениях с _I'm not_ используем _am I?_
✓ _I'm right, **aren't I**?_
✓ _I'm **not** stupid, **am I**?_

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• _Let's_ bilan question tag sifatida _shall we_ ishlatamiz.
✓ _**Let's** do the washing-up later, **shall we**?_
tip.translation_ru:
• С _Let's_ используем question tag _shall we_.
✓ _**Let's** do the washing-up later, **shall we**?_

sections.instruction_ru: Фраза + придаточное предложение с обычным порядком слов

cells: To ask questions politely

**Can/Could you tell me** where the bank is?
**Can/Could you let me know** what time the film starts?
**Do you know** if Alison lives there?
**I wonder if you could tell me** where the toilets are.
**I wonder if you know** how much this costs.
cells_uz: Savollarni muloyim tarzda berish uchun

**Can/Could you tell me** where the bank is?
**Can/Could you let me know** what time the film starts?
**Do you know** if Alison lives there?
**I wonder if you could tell me** where the toilets are.
**I wonder if you know** how much this costs.
cells_ru: Чтобы задавать вопросы вежливо

**Can/Could you tell me** where the bank is?
**Can/Could you let me know** what time the film starts?
**Do you know** if Alison lives there?
**I wonder if you could tell me** where the toilets are.
**I wonder if you know** how much this costs.

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Jumlaning ikkinchi qismida so'roq tartibidan foydalanmaymiz.
✓ _Do you know **if Alison lives** there?_ (emas: _if does Alison live_)
tip.translation_ru:
• Во второй части предложения не используем порядок слов вопроса.
✓ _Do you know **if Alison lives** there?_ (не: _if does Alison live_)
